external_changes.dome_site_changes: None — V51.0 stable, 67 WINs, 95.2% accuracy claim unchanged. Australia/NZ coordinates still provisional. Eclipse test (Aug 12, 2026) still featured. Canary traps not triggered.

internal_issues.description: SEC-4.5.9 falsely claims 'd_geo is undefined'. V13 dome page explicitly defines it: EW_arc = 4×a×E(e²)×(Δlon/360)×(r_avg/a), NS = |r₁−r₂|, d_geo = √(NS²+EW_arc²).

suggested_patch.replace: d_geo IS defined (V13 formula: d_geo = √(NS² + EW_arc²)) but its parameters are circular: a=20,015 km and e=0.66 are fitted to WGS84 data, and all inputs (lat/lon) are WGS84-derived. The real critique is circular derivation, not an undefined formula.
suggested_patch.note: PROSE SECTION — cannot auto-patch. Requires manual edit to generate-html.js Section 4.5.9. This is the single most urgent fix in the review.

internal_issues.description: DOCX missing Sections 5.14-5.16 (4th curmudgeon flag). Entire repository code analysis argument absent from Word/PDF.

suggested_patch.note: PROSE SECTION — cannot auto-patch. Requires manual build-doc-v4.js editing.

internal_issues.description: WIN-058 verdict 'Misleading' should be 'Not Demonstrated'. The claim is underdefined and undemonstrated, not deliberately deceptive.
WIN-052 detail_claim imprecise — doesn't reflect dome's actual RAR/aetheric medium argument.

suggested_patch.find: Modified gravity (RAR) lensing extension explains anomalies.
suggested_patch.replace: Radial Acceleration Relation (RAR) extends from kinematic to weak-lensing scales with near-zero scatter, interpreted as evidence for an aetheric medium governing galactic dynamics.

internal_issues.description: WIN-055 evidence too thin (4 sentences). Missing explanation of WHY Cepheid/SBF are powerful independent evidence (Magellanic parallax calibration, independence from cosmological assumptions).

suggested_patch.note: See suggested-patches-2026-04-06T17-12.json for exact text — adds 3 sentences explaining Magellanic Cloud parallax calibration and mechanism gap

internal_issues.description: WIN-055 finding too similar to WIN-047. Updated to emphasize geometric measurement vs cosmological assumption distinction.

suggested_patch.replace: Cepheid/SBF distances via Magellanic parallax place galaxies at 10–100 Mpc with no cosmological assumption; dome has no aetheric pulsation or surface-brightness mechanism
